project_risks.issue: 1 opening(s) have no hardware set assigned in the schedule.
project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

project_risks.issue: 22 hardware set(s) referenced by 41 door(s) have no extracted line items.
project_risks.recommendation: Locate full hardware set definitions; carry as allowance until confirmed.

project_risks.issue: 13 fire-rated opening(s) require coordinated UL-listed door, frame and hardware assemblies.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm labels, positive latching, closers and gasketing requirements.

project_risks.issue: 11 opening(s) involve electrified or access-control hardware.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm Div 08 / 26 / 27 / 28 scope split before bidding.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: 120I. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.

Provide the complete line-item list for hardware set(s): 103, 200CG, 201, 201C, 201CG, 214, 343, 503, 711CGR, 804AL, A001, C201, C201C, C201CG, C205, C214I, C710CR, C714A, D001, D201CG, D790CGMR, D794M.

For electrified openings (102, 103, 105A, 105C, 109, 113A, 113B, 120G, ...+3 more), confirm responsibility for 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, readers/head-end, fire alarm release, commissioning and programming.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.
rfi_log.reason: Carry Div 8 components only unless explicitly included.

rfi_log.question: Please provide the complete keying schedule, keyway, cylinder format, construction core requirement and key counts.
rfi_log.recommendation: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.
rfi_log.reason: Carry construction cylinders as an allowance until keying meeting is held.

estimator_notes: 42 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
22 hardware set(s) identified; 0 have a complete extracted item list.
2 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
2 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for fire-rated assembly coordination, S-label gasketing and any UL field-modification charges.
Allowance for construction cylinders and final keying meeting attendance.
coordination_items: Coordinate electrified hardware split: Div 08 hardware / Div 26 power / Div 27-28 low-voltage + head-end.
Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
